summary: Budget/Counter-Proposal Feature Testing Complete - All 7 features tested and verified
passed_tests: Backend: Project creation requires mandatory budget field (422 without budget)
Backend: Project creation with budget returns correct response with budget_status='pending'
Backend: Client can view projects with budget info
Backend: Admin can view all projects with proposed budget
Backend: Counter proposal without value returns 400 error
Backend: Admin can make counter proposal with value
Backend: Client sees budget_status and counter_proposal
Backend: Invalid budget status is rejected (400)
Frontend: Client registration and login working
Frontend: Project creation dialog shows mandatory 'Orçamento Proposto *' field
Frontend: Project card displays budget section with 'Proposto' and 'Orçamento Pendente' badge
Frontend: Admin projects page shows all projects with client info and budget
Frontend: Admin 'Responder ao Orçamento' dialog with Accept/Counter-proposal options
Frontend: Counter-proposal visible in project card with 'Contraproposta' badge
Frontend: Contact form submission shows success message
Frontend: Admin contacts page displays all contact submissions
seed_data_creation: Multiple test projects created with budget values for testing budget response feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget feature fully implemented. Admin account is admin@andredev.pt with password admin123. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_budget_feature.py covers all budget scenarios.

feature_verification_summary.feature_1_mandatory_budget: PASS - Budget field is required in ProjectCreate model and UI shows asterisk
feature_verification_summary.feature_2_fail_without_budget: PASS - Returns 422 validation error when budget not provided
feature_verification_summary.feature_3_admin_sees_budget: PASS - Admin projects page shows client's proposed budget
feature_verification_summary.feature_5_counter_proposal_requires_valu: PASS - Returns 400 if counter_proposal selected without value
feature_verification_summary.feature_6_client_sees_counter_proposal: PASS - Client dashboard shows budget_status, counter_proposal value, and admin_notes
feature_verification_summary.feature_7_contact_in_admin: PASS - Contact submissions visible in admin contacts page with delete option
